---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new supported behavior
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What should change?

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Why is it useful?

Explain the workflow it improves.

## Hardware impact

- Uses only existing AtomS3 hardware: yes / no
- Needs optional wiring or external hardware: yes / no
- Affects BLE hotkey behavior: yes / no
- Affects Wi-Fi OTA behavior: yes / no
- Affects display rendering: yes / no

## Proposed behavior

Describe the user-visible behavior, button gestures, display states, and any
configuration flags.

## Validation ideas

List how this could be tested on hardware.
